title: rubus koehleri var. infestus
intro: Rubus koehleri var. infestus is a variant of the Rubus koehleri plant, commonly known as the Japanese wild raspberry or bramble. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus koehleri var. infestus include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and leaves can be dried and used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
